Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Directs the commissioner of taxation and finance to help entities to elect to participate in the federal tax credit for elementary and secondary scholarships
Summary: Directs the commissioner of taxation and finance to help entities to elect to participate in the federal tax credit for elementary and secondary scholarships known as the Educational Choice for Children Act of 2025.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to directing the commissioner of taxation and finance to help entities elect to participate in the federal tax credit for elementary and secondary scholarships
